result.stdout:
1.5.2

Command-line interface for Azure Speech service.

Usage: speech [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information

Commands:
  compile       Helper to compile WAV samples and transcripts.
  config        Mandatory configuration. Use your Speech API key and region obtained from Azure portal or CRIS.ai portal.
  dataset       Commands to manage adaptation datasets.
  endpoint      Commands to manage speech endpoints.
  model         Acoustic and language model management.
  test          Commands related to acoustic model tests.
  transcript    Batch transcription.

Run 'speech [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
1.5.2

Command-line interface for Azure Speech service.

Usage: speech [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information

Commands:
  compile       Helper to compile WAV samples and transcripts.
  config        Mandatory configuration. Use your Speech API key and region obtained from Azure portal or CRIS.ai portal.
  dataset       Commands to manage adaptation datasets.
  endpoint      Commands to manage speech endpoints.
  model         Acoustic and language model management.
  test          Commands related to acoustic model tests.
  transcript    Batch transcription.

Run 'speech [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Helper to compile WAV samples and transcripts.

Usage: speech compile [options]

Options:
  -a|--audio <FOLDER>                 Path to folder where all WAV files are.
  -t|--transcript <FILE>              Path to the TXT file with transcripts. One line per WAV file.
  -o|--output <FOLDER>                Target folder. Will be created if non-existent. Default: audio folder
  -tp|--test-percentage <PERCENTAGE>  What portion (in %) of source data will be split as test dataset. Default: 10
  -c|--clean                          Delete training and testing WAV files when done and keep only ZIPped results.
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information

commands.payload:
Helper to compile WAV samples and transcripts.

Usage: speech compile [options]

Options:
  -a|--audio <FOLDER>                 Path to folder where all WAV files are.
  -t|--transcript <FILE>              Path to the TXT file with transcripts. One line per WAV file.
  -o|--output <FOLDER>                Target folder. Will be created if non-existent. Default: audio folder
  -tp|--test-percentage <PERCENTAGE>  What portion (in %) of source data will be split as test dataset. Default: 10
  -c|--clean                          Delete training and testing WAV files when done and keep only ZIPped results.
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information

result.stdout:
Mandatory configuration. Use your Speech API key and region obtained from Azure portal or CRIS.ai portal.

Usage: speech config [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  delete        Removes selected configuration set.
  list          Shows current settings.
  select        Selects which config set is currently active. Use this command to switch between subscriptions.
  set           Sets speech API key and region. If you provide one value, the other will not change.

Run 'config [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Sets speech API key and region. If you provide one value, the other will not change.

Usage: speech config set [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>      Name of the config set. If  Creates new one if not found, otherwise updates existing one.
  -k|--key <KEY>        Speech API subscription key.
  -r|--region <REGION>  Speech API region. Default: westus
  -s|--select           Make this subscription active after storing settings.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information

result.stdout:
Commands to manage adaptation datasets.

Usage: speech dataset [options] [command]

Options:
  --help   Show help information

Commands:
  create   Create new acoustic dataset.
           - Provide --audio and --transcript file to create acoustic dataset.
           - Provide --language file to create language dataset.
  delete   Delete specific dataset.
  list     Lists datasets in your subscription.
  locales  List locales available to create datasets.
  show     Show details of a specific dataset.

Run 'dataset [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Commands to manage adaptation datasets.

Usage: speech dataset [options] [command]

Options:
  --help   Show help information

Commands:
  create   Create new acoustic dataset.
           - Provide --audio and --transcript file to create acoustic dataset.
           - Provide --language file to create language dataset.
  delete   Delete specific dataset.
  list     Lists datasets in your subscription.
  locales  List locales available to create datasets.
  show     Show details of a specific dataset.

Run 'dataset [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Create new acoustic dataset.
- Provide --audio and --transcript file to create acoustic dataset.
- Provide --language file to create language dataset.

Usage: speech dataset create [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>                (Required) Name of this data import.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>  Description of this data import.
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>            Language of the data. Default: en-us
  -a|--audio <FILE>               ZIP file containing all audio samples. If provided, --transcript is also required.
  -t|--transcript <FILE>          TXT file with transcriptions of audio files. Must be UTF-8 BOM. If provided, --audio is also required.
  -lng|--language <FILE>          TXT file with language dataset.
  -pro|--pronunciation <FILE>     TXT file with pronunciation dataset.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for dataset to be ready.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>    Custom properties of this dataset. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

result.stdout:
Commands to manage speech endpoints.

Usage: speech endpoint [options] [command]

Options:
  --help       Show help information

Commands:
  create       Create new endpoint model based on acoustic model.
               You will need model ID (run 'speech model list' first).
  delete       Delete specific endpoint.
  delete-data  Delete specific endpoint's data.
  list         Lists endpoints in your subscription.
  show         Show details of a specific endpoint.

Run 'endpoint [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Commands to manage speech endpoints.

Usage: speech endpoint [options] [command]

Options:
  --help       Show help information

Commands:
  create       Create new endpoint model based on acoustic model.
               You will need model ID (run 'speech model list' first).
  delete       Delete specific endpoint.
  delete-data  Delete specific endpoint's data.
  list         Lists endpoints in your subscription.
  show         Show details of a specific endpoint.

Run 'endpoint [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Create new endpoint model based on acoustic model.
You will need model ID (run 'speech model list' first).

Usage: speech endpoint create [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                            Show help information
  -n|--name <NAME>                                        (Required) Endpoint name.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>                          Endpoint description.
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>                                    Language of the endpoint. Must be the same as acoustic dataset locale. Default: en-us.
  -m|--model <GUID>                                       (Required) ID of the acoustic model. Run 'speech model list' to see your models.
  -lm|--language-model <GUID>                             (Required) ID of the lanuage model. Run 'speech model list' to see your models.
  -c|--concurrent-recognitions <CONCURRENT_RECOGNITIONS>  The number of concurrent recognitions the endpoint supports. Default: 1.
  -cl|--content-logging                                   A value indicating whether content logging (audio & transcriptions) is being used for a deployment. Default: true.
  -w|--wait                                               Will stop and wait for endpoint to be ready.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>                            Custom properties of this endpoint. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'

commands.payload:
Create new endpoint model based on acoustic model.
You will need model ID (run 'speech model list' first).

Usage: speech endpoint create [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                            Show help information
  -n|--name <NAME>                                        (Required) Endpoint name.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>                          Endpoint description.
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>                                    Language of the endpoint. Must be the same as acoustic dataset locale. Default: en-us.
  -m|--model <GUID>                                       (Required) ID of the acoustic model. Run 'speech model list' to see your models.
  -lm|--language-model <GUID>                             (Required) ID of the lanuage model. Run 'speech model list' to see your models.
  -c|--concurrent-recognitions <CONCURRENT_RECOGNITIONS>  The number of concurrent recognitions the endpoint supports. Default: 1.
  -cl|--content-logging                                   A value indicating whether content logging (audio & transcriptions) is being used for a deployment. Default: true.
  -w|--wait                                               Will stop and wait for endpoint to be ready.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>                            Custom properties of this endpoint. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'

result.stdout:
Acoustic and language model management.

Usage: speech model [options] [command]

Options:
  --help          Show help information

Commands:
  create          Create new acoustic model based on adaptation dataset.
                  You will need dataset ID and scenario ID (run 'model list-scenarios' first).
  delete          Delete specific acoustic or language model.
  list            Lists acoustic and language models in your subscription.
  list-scenarios  Lists scenario models (base models) for given locale.
  locales         List locales available to create models.
  show            Show specific model.
  status          Shows status of specific acoustic or language model.

Run 'model [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:

Usage: speech model [options] [command]

Options:
  --help          Show help information

Commands:
  create          Create new acoustic model based on adaptation dataset.
                  You will need dataset ID and scenario ID (run 'model list-scenarios' first).
  delete          Delete specific acoustic or language model.
  list            Lists acoustic and language models in your subscription.
  list-scenarios  Lists scenario models (base models) for given locale.
  locales         List locales available to create models.
  show            Show specific model.

Run 'model [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Create new acoustic model based on adaptation dataset.
You will need dataset ID and scenario ID (run 'model list-scenarios' first).

Usage: speech model create [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>                     (Required) Acoustic model name.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>       Acoustic model description.
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>                 Locale of the model. Must be the same as acoustic dataset locale. Default: en-us.
  -a|--audio-dataset <GUID>            ID of the adaptation dataset used to train the model. Required when '--language-dataset' not provided.
  -lng|--language-dataset <GUID>       ID of the language dataset used to train language model. Required when '--audio-dataset' not provided.
  -pro|--pronunciation-dataset <GUID>  ID of the pronunciation dataset used to train language model. Required when '--audio-dataset' not provided.
  -s|--scenario <GUID>                 (Required) ID of base acoustic model. To get available scenarios for given locale, run 'model list-scenarios --locale en-us'.
  -w|--wait                            Will stop and wait for training to complete.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>         Custom properties of this model. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'
  -?|-h|--help                         Show help information

commands.payload:
Create new acoustic model based on adaptation dataset.
You will need dataset ID and scenario ID (run 'model list-scenarios' first).

Usage: speech model create [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>                     (Required) Acoustic model name.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>       Acoustic model description.
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>                 Locale of the model. Must be the same as acoustic dataset locale. Default: en-us.
  -a|--audio-dataset <GUID>            ID of the adaptation dataset used to train the model. Required when '--language-dataset' not provided.
  -lng|--language-dataset <GUID>       ID of the language dataset used to train language model. Required when '--audio-dataset' not provided.
  -pro|--pronunciation-dataset <GUID>  ID of the pronunciation dataset used to train language model. Required when '--audio-dataset' not provided.
  -s|--scenario <GUID>                 (Required) ID of base acoustic model. To get available scenarios for given locale, run 'model list-scenarios --locale en-us'.
  -w|--wait                            Will stop and wait for training to complete.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>         Custom properties of this model. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'
  -?|-h|--help                         Show help information

result.stdout:
Lists scenario models (base models) for given locale.

Usage: speech model list-scenarios [options]

Options:
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>                                                                               Language of the model. Default: en-us.
  -p|--purpose <OnlineTranscription | BatchTranscription | AcousticAdaptation | LanguageAdaptation>  Purpose of the base model. Use 'all' to disable purpose filter. Default: AcousticAdaptation.
  -s|--simple                                                                                        Returns only a list of GUIDs, without additional information. Ordered from newest to oldest.
  -?|-h|--help                                                                                       Show help information

commands.payload:

  -s|--simple                                                                                        Returns only a list of GUIDs, without additional information. Ordered from newest to oldest.
  -?|-h|--help                                                                                       Show help information

result.stdout:
Commands related to acoustic model tests.

Usage: speech test [options] [command]

Options:
  --help  Show help information

Commands:
  create  Creates new accuracy test.
  delete  Deletes specified accuracy test.
  list    Lists accuracy tests in your subscription.
  show    Shows details of specified accuracy test.
  status  Shows status of specific accuracy test.

Run 'test [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Commands related to acoustic model tests.

Usage: speech test [options] [command]

Options:
  --help  Show help information

Commands:
  create  Creates new accuracy test.
  delete  Deletes specified accuracy test.
  list    Lists accuracy tests in your subscription.
  show    Shows details of specified accuracy test.
  status  Shows status of specific accuracy test.

Run 'test [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Creates new accuracy test.

Usage: speech test create [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>                (Required) Accuracy test name.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>  Accuracy test description.
  -a|--audio-dataset <GUID>       (Required) ID of the adaptation dataset used for accuracy test (testing dataset). Run 'dataset list' to see your datasets.
  -m|--model <GUID>               (Required) ID of the acoustic model against which to run the accuracy test. Run 'model list' to see your models.
  -lm|--language-model <GUID>     (Required) ID of the lanuage model. Run 'speech model list' to see your models.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for testing to complete.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>    Custom properties of this test. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

commands.payload:
Creates new accuracy test.

Usage: speech test create [options]

  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>  Accuracy test description.
  -a|--audio-dataset <GUID>       (Required) ID of the adaptation dataset used for accuracy test (testing dataset). Run 'dataset list' to see your datasets.
  -m|--model <GUID>               (Required) ID of the acoustic model against which to run the accuracy test. Run 'model list' to see your models.
  -lm|--language-model <GUID>     (Required) ID of the lanuage model. Run 'speech model list' to see your models.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for testing to complete.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>    Custom properties of this test. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

result.stdout:
Batch transcription.

Usage: speech transcript [options] [command]

Options:
  --help    Show help information

Commands:
  create    Start new batch transcription.
  delete    Delete specific batch transcription.
  download  Download results of finished transcription.
  list      Get a list of batch transcriptions.
  show      Show specific batch transcription.
  single    Run transcription on single, short file.
  update    Update mutable details of a transcription.

Run 'transcript [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Batch transcription.

Usage: speech transcript [options] [command]

Options:
  --help    Show help information

Commands:
  create    Start new batch transcription.
  delete    Delete specific batch transcription.
  download  Download results of finished transcription.
  list      Get a list of batch transcriptions.
  show      Show specific batch transcription.
  single    Run transcription on single, short file.
  update    Update mutable details of a transcription.

Run 'transcript [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Start new batch transcription.

Usage: speech transcript create [options]

Options:
  -n|--name <NAME>                (Required) Name of this transcription.
  -d|--description <DESCRIPTION>  Description of this transcription.
  -l|--locale <LOCALE>            Language. Default: en-us
  -r|--recording <URL>            URL pointing to audio file.
  -m|--model <GUID>               ID of the acoustic model to use. Run 'model list' to get your models. Default: baseline.
  -lng|--language <GUID>          ID of language model to use. Run 'model list' to get your models. Default: baseline.
  -wt|--word-level-timestamps     Include the 'AddWordLevelTimestamps' property with the request. Has priority over Properties parameter.
  -di|--diarization               Include the 'AddDiarization' property to distinguish between speakers. Has priority over Properties parameter.
  -s|--sentiment                  Include the 'AddSentiment' property to identify sentiment per utternace. Has priority over Properties parameter.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for transcription to be ready.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>    Custom properties of this transcription. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

  -di|--diarization               Include the 'AddDiarization' property to distinguish between speakers. Has priority over Properties parameter.
  -s|--sentiment                  Include the 'AddSentiment' property to identify sentiment per utternace. Has priority over Properties parameter.
  -w|--wait                       Will stop and wait for transcription to be ready.
  -p|--properties <PROPERTIES>    Custom properties of this transcription. Format: '--properties prop1=val1;prop2=val2;prop3=val3'

Delete specific batch transcription.

Usage: speech transcript delete [arguments] [options]

Options:

result.stdout:
Download results of finished transcription.

Usage: speech transcript download [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  GUID                         ID of the transcription to download.

Options:
  -o|--out-dir <OUT_DIR>       (Optional) Output directory where transcriptions will be downloaded. Default: current directory
  -f|--format <JSON|VTT|TXT>   (Optional) Output format. Currently supported are: VTT, JSON and TXT. Default = JSON
  -fn|--file-name <FILE_NAME>  (Optional) Transcript will be downloaded into a file with this name. Extension will be determined by format.
  -?|-h|--help                 Show help information

  -fn|--file-name <FILE_NAME>  (Optional) Transcript will be downloaded into a file with this name. Extension will be determined by format.

result.stdout:
Run transcription on single, short file.

Usage: speech transcript single [options]

Options:
  -i|--input <INPUT_FILE>               WAV file for transcription.
  -e|--endpoint <ENDPOINT>              Speech endpoint which should perform the transcription. If not specified, baseline will be used.
  -o|--output-format <Simple|Detailed>  ... Default: Simple
  -?|-h|--help                          Show help information
